title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
